blended.narrative: Caberfae Peaks is looking at a significant storm over the next 48 hours, with 19 inches of snowfall of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 1,691 ft. Looking ahead, 21 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 6" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tomorrow: 14" of heavy snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tuesday: 2.4" of snow, highs of 14°F. Expect powder.
